prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科最低位次分别为7508、7434、6929、9618、7169名，波动较大，2024年出现明显后移（9618名），2025年回弹至7169名，近两年呈震荡走势，2025年基准约7169名；该校在陕西理科招生计划2021年161人、2022–2024年均为158人，2025年物理类152人，2026年物理类计划178人，较2025年扩招约17.1%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第27名，近年排名稳定在第23–27名区间，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面（原校长张尧学因涉嫌严重违纪违法被查，涉及学术声誉问题）；2025年声誉偏负面（重庆断档事件）；2024年偏负面（部分省份断档）；抖音热度排名第85位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量偏低。整体声誉偏负面可能使部分考生报考趋于谨慎；第五轮学科评估A-及以上13个：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、土木工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等中南大学优势专业社会热度持续偏高；本省物理类考生2026年约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争明显加剧，2025年物理类本科批394分、特殊类型招生控制线473分；中南大学位于湖南长沙，属中部地区，在陕西无显著地域偏好加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7169名、2026年扩招约17.1%、本省物理类考生增加约19.7%以及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招与考生增加效应大致对冲，但考生增幅略大于扩招幅度，叠加学校学科实力强劲对高分考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约7825名，区间7325–8325名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were 7508, 7434, 6929, 9618, and 7169 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, there was a notable backward shift (9618), and in 2025 it rebounded to 7169, with a volatile trend in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7169. The university's science enrollment plan in Shaanxi was 161 in 2021, 158 from 2022 to 2024, 152 in 2025 for physics category, and 178 in 2026 for physics category, an increase of about 17.1% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. In 2026, reputation evaluation is negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue under investigation for serious violations of discipline and law, involving academic reputation issues); in 2025, reputation is negative (Chongqing gap incident); in 2024, negative (gaps in some provinces). Douyin popularity ranks 85th, rated as average, with low short video exposure. Overall negative reputation may make some candidates more cautious in applying. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 13 disciplines are rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, providing sustained attraction to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Central South University's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. In 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch line was 394 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 473 points. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the central region, with no significant regional preference advantage in Shaanxi.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7169, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 17.1%, the increase in provincial physics category candidates by about 19.7%, and the negative reputation, the expansion and candidate increase effects roughly offset each other, but the candidate increase is slightly larger than the expansion. Coupled with the university's strong disciplinary strength that continues to attract high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted lowest ranking is about 7825, with a range of 7325–8325.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7325–8325, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7325), prioritize Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 8325), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety. Central South University's advantageous disciplines such as Medicine, Computer Science, and Automation have high social popularity, leading to intense competition in applications, so a reasonable gradient of choices is necessary.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts were 748, 742, 736, 882, and 1009 respectively, showing a slow backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 273 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 1009 in 2025; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Shaanxi was 14 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 19 in 2025 for history category, and planned 24 in 2026 for history category, an expansion of about 26.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and has a notable easing effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked about 27th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top universities nationwide; reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative (former president investigated); in 2025 somewhat negative (Chongqing gap); Douyin popularity ranked 85th, with average reviews. Overall negative reputation may make some liberal arts candidates more cautious in applying; Central South University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines: Marxist Theory A-, while majors like Law, Chinese Language and Literature do not have direct A-level ratings, the university's overall strength is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity and is recommended, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, liberal arts-related majors have stable popularity; the number of history category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; in 2025, the history category undergraduate batch line was 414 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 497 points; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, with no significant regional preference advantage in Shaanxi.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1009, the 2026 expansion of about 26.3%, the increase in history category candidates in the province by about 17%, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion rate is significantly larger than the candidate growth rate, so competition is expected to ease somewhat, but the historical trend of continuous backward shift in rankings and the somewhat negative reputation impose certain constraints. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025 (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 1198, with a range of 1027–1369.
